transcript: Speaker A: मी खात आहे. [I am eating.] Speaker B: I am eating. Speaker A: तू खात आहेस का? [Are you eating?] Speaker B: Are you eating? Speaker A: तू काय खात आहेस? [What are you eating?] Speaker B: What are you eating? Speaker A: मला खायचं आहे. [I want to eat.] Speaker B: I want to eat. Speaker A: तुला खायचं आहे का? [Do you want to eat?] Speaker B: Do you want to eat? Speaker A: मला खायला आवडतं. [I like to eat.] Speaker B: I like to eat. Speaker A: तुला खायला आवडतं का? [Do you like to eat?] Speaker B: Do you like to eat? Speaker A: आपल्या सगळ्यांनाच खायला आवडतं. [We all like to eat.] Speaker B: We all like to eat. Speaker A: अरे वा यार! तुझी इंग्लिश तर खूपच मस्त आहे. तू इतकी भारी इंग्लिश कुठे शिकलास? [Wow, buddy! Your English is really great. Where did you learn such awesome English?] Speaker B: MySivi App वर शिकलो भावा. भावा MySivi App वर एक AI teacher आहे जी मराठीतूनच इंग्लिश बोलायला शिकवते. इंग्लिश शिकणं रील बघण्याइतकं सोपं झालंय. फक्त १५ मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस करा आणि १५ दिवसांतच फरक दिसेल. आणि हे सगळं तुम्ही फक्त १ रुपयात सुरू करू शकता. [Learnt on MySivi App, brother. Brother, there is an AI teacher on MySivi App who teaches English speaking through Marathi. Learning English has become as easy as watching reels. Just practice for 15 minutes and you will see the difference in 15 days. And you can start all this for just 1 rupee.] Speaker A: अरे वा! मग मी आजच MySivi App डाऊनलोड करतो आणि प्रॅक्टिस सुरू करतो. [Wow! Then I will download the MySivi App today and start practicing.] Speaker C: Install Now वरती क्लिक करा अजून MySivi App डाऊनलोड करा. [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi App.]

summary: An AI-animated father and son practice English translation, showcasing how the son easily translates Marathi sentences. The son explains he learned this using the MySivi app, which features an AI teacher that teaches English through Marathi. The ad concludes with a promotional offer to start a trial for just 1 rupee and a call to action to install the app.
